name: sensorQueueReadFrame
title: sensorQueueReadFrame
syntax: SensorErrorCode sensorQueueReadFrame(char[] sysVarNamespace, dword readByteCount); // from 1
SensorErrorCode sensorQueueReadFrame(char[] sysVarNamespace, dword readByteCount, dword startDelayNs); // from 2
description: This function is intended to be used for I2C master simulation. It queues a frame to read the given number of bytes from the given slave.

parameters.name: sysVarNamespace
parameters.description: The namespace of the slave the data shall be queued in.

parameters.name: readByteCount
parameters.description: The number of bytes to read from the slave.

parameters.name: startDelayNs
parameters.description: Delay in ns before the frame is actually sent to the slave.

example.code:
// Queue a request to read 4 bytes from the slave
sensorQueueFrame("SENSOR::I2C::ExampleChannel::ExampleSlave", 4);

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
